title: Facility's Charm
description: This project is a mod inspired by SCP: Lockdown and the SCP Universe in general, it aims to add many SCP themed blocks to build a functional facility in Minecraft.
body:
# Facility's Charm
This project is a mod inspired by SCP: Lockdown and the SCP Universe in general, it aims to add many SCP themed blocks to build a functional facility in Minecraft.
![Line-up of almost every block present in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de4ae4ba12d8114fa62ff967a0c4c6ab1f1e9304.png)

Facility's Charm was initially destined to be a private mod to play with friends. However, it was deemed fit for public use, as it adds many decorative and functional blocks that may aid other players in designing their own facilities.

![Screenshot of a potential facility built around this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/535c3953ca1143d1982b98197706852593ab16cd.png)

This mod includes many features, such as:

- A set of decorative walls divided in Heavy Zone (black concrete) and Light Zone (white concrete) with all its correspective wayfinding variants.
- Functional Keycards (can be regulated with the Screwdriver to regulate clearances), Buttons and custom doors.
- Communications pad & Ambience Intercom for immersiveness.
- Several other decorative & functional blocks.

![Additional view of a potential facility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a410e4377cc9fc1ee3f8fb130fae5c3acfbeed58.png)

While the mod is being constantly updated, some bugs may remain due to the limitations of the software used to develop the project, this is why feedback and constructive critique is highly appreciated.

Currently, as a temporary fix, if you may encounter machines (Keycards, Doors, Computers) that may be stuck, you may either use the Wrench or the Screwdriver depending on the issue.
